# Pull Request Template

## Summary
Provide a short, descriptive summary of the change. Include context and why this change is needed.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore / maintenance

## Related Issue
Link to the related issue or ticket number (if any):

## Description of Changes
List the main changes made in this PR (bullet points):

- 
- 

## How to Test
Steps to reproduce or test the change locally:

1. 
2. 

## Screenshots / Logs (if applicable)
Add screenshots, error logs, or other artifacts that help reviewers.

## Checklist
- [ ] I ran tests locally and they pass
- [ ] I added or updated tests where applicable
- [ ] I ran linters/formatters (e.g., black, flake8) and fixed issues
- [ ] I updated documentation if needed (README, CHANGELOG)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials are included in this PR

## Reviewer Notes
Anything specific reviewers should pay attention to, potential risks, or deployment notes.

---
Thanks for your contribution! Please ensure the PR is small and focused for easier review.
